fixes.suggestion: Table missing. Run: php artisan migrate
SQLite table missing. Run: php artisan migrate
PostgreSQL not running. Start with: brew services start postgresql
MySQL not running. Start with: brew services start mysql
Database credentials wrong. Check DB_USERNAME and DB_PASSWORD in .env
Dependency conflict. Try: npm install --legacy-peer-deps
Vue dependency missing. Run: npm install
Frontend not built. Run: npm run build (or npm run dev for local)
Missing dependency. Run: npm install (or composer install for PHP)
Node ran out of memory. Increase limit: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096
Autoload stale. Run: composer dump-autoload
Session expired or cache stale. Run: php artisan cache:clear && php artisan config:clear
Route cache stale. Run: php artisan route:clear
View path wrong or cache stale. Check path and run: php artisan view:clear
Insufficient file permissions. Check with: ls -la <path>. Fix with: chmod or chown
Permission denied (Node/npm). Avoid sudo. Fix ownership: sudo chown -R $(whoami) ~/.npm
Disk full or inotify limit reached. Free disk space or increase watchers: echo fs.inotify.max_user_watches=524288 | sudo tee -a /etc/sysctl.conf
File or directory not found. Verify the path exists and is spelled correctly

fixes.pattern_match: port.*already in use|Address already in use|EADDRINUSE
fixes.suggestion: Port occupied. Kill the process: lsof -ti:<port> | xargs kill -9
Merge conflict detected. Open conflicting files, resolve markers (<<<< ==== >>>>), then git add and commit
Remote has changes. Pull first: git pull --rebase origin <branch>
Not inside a git repo. Run: git init, or cd into the correct directory
Test failures. Check assertions, fixtures, and database state. Run: php artisan migrate:fresh --seed --env=testing
Jest test failures. Check test expectations and mocks. Run: npx jest --clearCache if stale
